message:
fix: add extractIssueID unwrap to TUI convoy consumers and simplify test (gt-yp2pxc)

Code review of gt-qg6s06 fix found two additional TUI consumers of
convoy tracked issues that never unwrap external:prefix:id format:
- internal/tui/feed/convoy.go:getTrackedIssueStatus()
- internal/tui/convoy/model.go:loadTrackedIssues()

Also simplified TestFormatTrackBeadIDConsumerCompatibility to call the
actual extractIssueID() function instead of reimplementing the parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
